title: SkillManifest
description: Implements: docs/contracts-canonical.md §8; docs/brainstorming/ToolManifest与工具适配层规格.md; Skill Pack registration contract

input_schema_ref.description: $id URI of the input JSON Schema

output_schema_ref.description: $id URI of the output JSON Schema

tool_refs.description: tool_ids this skill requires; must resolve via ToolManifest

runtime_compatibility.description: Runtimes this skill is compatible with. Hermes/OpenClaw removed per 框架中立原则 — integration lives in runtime adapters, not domain contracts.
